rationale: The page provides specific details regarding the UNESCO nomination procedure for documentary items, including eligibility for nomination and the limits on the number of proposals per Member State. This is factual information relevant to cultural heritage and international organizations.
cleanedText:
Nomination Procedure
Any organization or individual can nominate a documentary item.
Nominations are submitted via UNESCO Member States through their National Commission for UNESCO (or relevant government body).
* Two proposals per UNESCO Member State per nomination cycle.
* Unlimited joint nomination proposals from two or more Member States.
